entry.title: IDC N0017804D4083 (P00029) awarded to MCLAUGHLIN RESEARCH CORP, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:legislativeMandates.ns1:otherStatutoryAuthority: ALL WARRANTED CONTRACTING OFFICERS FROM THE NAVAL SEA SYSTEMS COMMAND, NAVAL AIR SYSTEMS COMMAND, SPACE AND NAVAL WARFARE COMMAND, NAVAL SUPPLY SYSTEMS COMMAND, MILITARY SEALIFT COMMAND, STRATEGIC SYSTEMS PROGRAMS, NAVAL FACILITIES ENGINEER ING COMMAND, OFFICE OF NAVAL RESEARCH, AND THE UNITED STATES MARINE CORPS ARE AUTHORIZED TO PLACE ORDERS UNDER THIS IDIQ CONTRACT.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
